9/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,3 AND PC1203,4 MOTIONS/MO GRTD/X: DEFENDANT'SMOTION FOR EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,3 IS GRANTED,/CTORD: PROBATION IN # 2498467 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/X: MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4 IS ALSO GRANTED BY THE COURT,/X: PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/
